summary: Excellent! The test passed, confirming that the pagination issue has been resolved. The fix involved correcting the offset calculation in the `list_products` function in `app.py`. The original code had an off-by-one error due to the incorrect offset calculation, which was subtracting an extra 1 for pages greater than 1. This caused a gap between the items on page 1 and page 2. The corrected offset calculation ensures that pagination works as expected.
